creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Sun, 11 Jun 2000 16:42:52 -0500 (CDT),
mdharnois@home.com wrote:
> >Synopsis:       VMWare Beta 2.0.1 RC1 available

> >Description:
> 
> new beta/release candidate available. patches are broken.
                                                don't apply cleanly to
                                                the new version

Thanks for the notice, but I'm aware of it.  Necessary changes are
just trivial.  Look at those three .rej files.  They are merely caused
by some whitespace/comment changes.

In fact, the vendor has been made no essential changes over
vmmon/vmnet modules since 2.0 release.  I, personally, have been
longing for them to start supporting USB and CD-R/CD-RW, however,
I can see no signs yet. :(
